mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0506_01-01#Sql001 */ TO_CHAR( ADD_MONTHS(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, - month_num) , 'YYYY"年"MM"月"' ) AS CODE_NAME , TO_CHAR( ADD_MONTHS(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, - month_num) , 'YYYYMM' ) AS CODE_ID FROM ( SELECT rownum - 1 AS month_num FROM all_catalog WHERE rownum < 61 )
